translations.en: Let me know when you arrive.
I kindly ask for your help.
I kindly ask for your help.

translations.indo: Nggak bisa, soalnya aku lagi kerja.
Nggak bisa, soalnya aku lagi kerja nih.
Saya tidak bisa karena sedang bekerja.

translations.en: Oh, so that’s how it is.
That’s why I told you earlier.
That’s why I told you earlier.
translations.indo: Makanya aku bilang dari tadi nih.

translations.en: I want to, but I’m tired.
I want to, but I’m tired.
I want to, but I can’t right now.
translations.indo: Saya mau, tapi tidak bisa sekarang.

translations.en: Known each other a long time.
We've known each other a long time.

translations.fr: J'ai un frère / une sœur aîné(e).

translations.en: They're a close friend of mine.
Be careful on the road, okay?
translations.fr: Fais attention sur la route, d'accord ?

translations.en: I want to talk about that.
